'''âk-sh-y''' ('''kakashay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chairman|chairman]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chairman|chairman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-sh-y
|-
! Lemma
| kakashay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikashay|thikashay]] || [[word:jikashay|jikashay]] || [[word:shikashay|shikashay]] || [[word:kikashay|kikashay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukashay|thuthukashay]] || [[word:jujukashay|jujukashay]] || [[word:shushukashay|shushukashay]] || [[word:kukukashay|kukukashay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukashay|thukashay]] || [[word:jukashay|jukashay]] || [[word:shukashay|shukashay]] || [[word:kukashay|kukashay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukashay|thukashay]] || [[word:jukashay|jukashay]] || [[word:shukashay|shukashay]] || [[word:kukashay|kukashay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekashay|thekashay]] || [[word:jekashay|jekashay]] || [[word:shekashay|shekashay]] || [[word:kekashay|kekashay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokashay|thothokashay]] || [[word:jojokashay|jojokashay]] || [[word:shoshokashay|shoshokashay]] || [[word:kokokashay|kokokashay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokashay|thokashay]] || [[word:jokashay|jokashay]] || [[word:shokashay|shokashay]] || [[word:kokashay|kokashay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokashay|thokashay]] || [[word:jokashay|jokashay]] || [[word:shokashay|shokashay]] || [[word:kokashay|kokashay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkashay|thĂŠkashay]] || [[word:jĂŠkashay|jĂŠkashay]] || [[word:shĂŠkashay|shĂŠkashay]] || [[word:kĂŠkashay|kĂŠkashay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakashay|thathakashay]] || [[word:jajakashay|jajakashay]] || [[word:shashakashay|shashakashay]] || [[word:kakakashay|kakakashay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakashay|thakashay]] || [[word:jakashay|jakashay]] || [[word:shakashay|shakashay]] || [[word:kakashay|kakashay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakashay|thakashay]] || [[word:jakashay|jakashay]] || [[word:shakashay|shakashay]] || [[word:kakashay|kakashay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakashay|shakashay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakashay|goshakashay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakashay|gokishakashay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakashaynĂŒ|shakashaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakashaynknĂŒ|goshakashaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakashaynĂŒ|gokishakashaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakashayshĂ«|shakashayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakashaynkshĂ«|goshakashaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakashayshĂ«|gokishakashayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakashayro|shakashayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakashaynkro|goshakashaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakashayro|gokishakashayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakashaymu|shakashaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakashaynkmu|goshakashaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakashaymu|gokishakashaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakashaysher|shakashaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakashaynksher|goshakashaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakashaysher|gokishakashaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakashayng|shakashayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakashaynkng|goshakashaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakashayng|gokishakashayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakashaya|shakashaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakashaynkya|goshakashaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakashaya|gokishakashaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakashayam|shakashayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakashaynkyam|goshakashaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakashayam|gokishakashayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakashaynĂŒshĂ«|shakashaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakashaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshakashaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakashaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishakashaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakashaynĂŒro|shakashaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakashaynknĂŒro|goshakashaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakashaynĂŒro|gokishakashaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakashaynĂŒmu|shakashaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakashaynknĂŒmu|goshakashaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakashaynĂŒmu|gokishakashaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakashayshĂ«nĂŒ|shakashayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakashaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakashaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakashayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakashayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakashayshĂ«ro|shakashayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakashaynkshĂ«ro|goshakashaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakashayshĂ«ro|gokishakashayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakashayshĂ«mu|shakashayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakashaynkshĂ«mu|goshakashaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakashayshĂ«mu|gokishakashayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakashayronĂŒ|shakashayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakashaynkronĂŒ|goshakashaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakashayronĂŒ|gokishakashayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakashayroshĂ«|shakashayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakashaynkroshĂ«|goshakashaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakashayroshĂ«|gokishakashayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakashayromu|shakashayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakashaynkromu|goshakashaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakashayromu|gokishakashayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakashaymunĂŒ|shakashaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakashaynkmunĂŒ|goshakashaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakashaymunĂŒ|gokishakashaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakashaymushĂ«|shakashaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakashaynkmushĂ«|goshakashaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakashaymushĂ«|gokishakashaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakashaymuro|shakashaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakashaynkmuro|goshakashaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakashaymuro|gokishakashaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
